title: Amongollectism
description: Mod adding various characters from FNF mods about Among Us as items that you can collect
body: A mod made with Mcreator that adds 30+ Among Us FNF mods characters as items that you can collect. These items don't have any special use, collecting them is just supposed to be additional goal. On survival, the characters can be obtained from destroying a crate block. The crate block can be crafted using 1 iron ingot, 4 iron nuggets and 4 gold nuggets. The mod also add new structure, crashed dropship, that can be found in Overworld, in which 4 crates can be found.
